response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 10% below threshold but cluster is in critical collapse with zero outbound capacity; accepting would violate zero-outbound enforcement and drain our 11.5% reserve below survival minimum—aggregator emergency injection is the only viable path.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Islanded cluster total collapse; all peers in critical depletion and inbound-only mode. r0c0 at 11.5% SoC (13 min autonomy). Peer-to-peer sharing exhausted. Aggregator emergency supply injection mandatory for survival. Zero outbound enforced..
